diagrams.title: Types of Requirements in Capacity Planning
diagrams.description: Hierarchical diagram showing the classification of requirements from business level to technical implementation
diagrams.purpose: Understand requirement hierarchy and classification for capacity planning

diagrams.title: Capacity Planning Measurement Categories
diagrams.description: Visual representation of key measurement areas in IT capacity planning
diagrams.purpose: Visualize the different measurement domains and their interrelationships

diagrams.title: Availability Percentages and Downtime
diagrams.description: Comparison table showing common availability percentages and their corresponding allowable downtime
diagrams.purpose: Understand the impact of availability percentages on capacity planning and SLA definitions

diagrams.title: Scalability Approaches
diagrams.description: Visual comparison of vertical vs horizontal scaling strategies
elements: Vertical: Single server with more CPU/RAM (scale-up)
diagrams.purpose: Comprehend different scalability strategies for capacity planning decisions
